input.headline: First kiss dates back 21 million years, say scientists

raw.headline: First kiss dates back 21 million years, say scientists

winner: The first kiss was so old, it had its own fossil record—scientists just couldn’t find the lips.

candidates.text: Scientists say the first kiss dates back 21 million years—so I guess my awkward high school make-out session was just a tiny improvement.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Surprising twist on a scientific claim with relatable personal touch"}

candidates.text: I asked my dating app if there were any matches from the Cretaceous period, and it said, "Sorry, we only have profiles dating back 21 million years.

candidates.text: I guess that means my first kiss with that cavewoman was a lot more evolutionary than I thought.

candidates.text: The scientists are still trying to figure out if the prehistoric couple actually liked it or if they just had a really long period of geological tension.
